# BRIEF

## Goal

Temporarily route paid pricing interest through the contact form instead of Polar checkout.

## Success Criteria

- Standard and Plus buttons go to contact with selected plan/cycle context.
- Contact page displays a payment-automation notice for paid-plan visitors.
- Contact email includes selected plan/cycle.
- Polar checkout code remains easy to re-enable.
- Frontend build passes.

## Non-Goals

- Backend billing changes.
- Removing Polar integration.
- Redesigning pricing or contact pages.
